flowchart TD
  subgraph Outer
    Start --> Pipeline
    subgraph Pipeline
      Fetch --> Done
    end
  end
---
+---------------+
|     Outer     |
|               |
|               |
|   +-------+   |
|   |       |   |
|   | Start |   |
|   |       |   |
|   +-------+   |
|       |       |
|       |       |
|       |       |
|       |       |
|       v       |
| +-----------+ |
| | Pipeline  | |
| |           | |
| |           | |
| | +-------+ | |
| | |       | | |
| | | Fetch | | |
| | |       | | |
| | +-------+ | |
| |     |     | |
| |     |     | |
| |     |     | |
| |     |     | |
| |     v     | |
| | +-------+ | |
| | |       | | |
| | |  Done | | |
| | |       | | |
| | +-------+ | |
| |           | |
| +-----------+ |
|               |
+---------------+
